---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for API Tester OSS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem you're facing or the limitation you've encountered. What are you trying to do that the app doesn't currently support?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen. Describe how the feature would work from a user's perspective.

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why didn't they work for you?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
